source_pr.title: Hanfei/rewrite plan
source_pr.body: remove result field from plan stage.

symptoms: result = tk.MustQuery("select * from t1 left join t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c1 right join t3 on t2.c1 = t3.c1 order by t1.c1, t1.c2, t2.c1, t2.c2, t3.c1, t3.c2;") (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: result = tk.MustQuery("select * from t1 left join t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c1 right join t3 on t2.c1 = t3.c1 order by t1.c1, t1.c2, t2.c1, t2.c2, t3.c1, t3.c2;") (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: result = tk.MustQuery("select * from t1 left join t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c1 right join t3 on t2.c1 = t3.c1 order by t1.c1, t1.c2, t2.c1, t2.c2, t3.c1, t3.c2;") (executor/executor_test.go)
